commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a default-off `mcp.servers.<name>.injectCallerContext` option that injects OpenClaw agent/account/channel headers into opted-in remote bundle MCP servers across CLI, Codex/Gemini, embedded runtime, schema/help, and tests.

PR surface: Source +270, Tests +718. Total +988 across 19 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a new feature PR, and current-main absence was source-confirmed by searching for `injectCallerContext`.
